name: sigil-lang
description: Sigil - A machine-first programming language optimized for AI code generation

scripts.lex: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil lex
scripts.sigil:test:stdlib: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test language/stdlib-tests/tests
scripts.sigil:test:algorithms: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test projects/algorithms/tests
scripts.sigil:test:todo: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test projects/todo-app/tests
scripts.sigil:test:all: pnpm sigil:test:stdlib && pnpm sigil:test:algorithms && pnpm sigil:test:todo
